caption:
"CHECK OUT OUR UPCOMING EVENTS FOR OCTOBER!🔥

Maximize your Handshake Experience- Want to learn more about Handshake’s features and how to use them throughout your college journey? Join this info session to dive into Handshake’s components and learn how to maximize your Handshake experience!

Become a Resume Pro- Having trouble constructing a resume? Join us for an in-person presentation where students will learn how to write a resume and shown examples of different types of resumes. We will go step-by-step on how to construct a resume. We will also share department resources for 1:1 appointments and resume reviews.

Visit the link in our bio for more information and to register!🔗".

caption:
"‼️EVENT ALERT‼️

Presented by Student Employment:

Join this co-facilitated presentation with Studio Institute to learn about the Job Location and Development Program and how to network with employers. Hear from Studio Institute representatives to learn about networking and career development preparation within the field of arts.

Studio Institute is a program intended to provide opportunities for learners of all ages within visual arts education and career development opportunities. They house positions such as summer art opportunities, art instructors, program assistants, and more.

• Virtual event is open to ALL majors and is a great opportunity for major and career exploration!😁

Interested majors Include: Design & Applied Arts, Marketing, Architecture, Industrial & Interior design, Liberal Arts

Registration link is in our bio!💻".

"‼️UPCOMING EVENT‼️

Join this co-facilitated presentation with TPN to learn about the Job Location and Development Program and how to network with employers. Hear from TPN representatives to learn about networking, interview tips, and career development preparation.
